act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Exempted supplies, or exempted imports.—Notwithstanding anything
content:
26. Exempted supplies, or exempted imports.—Notwithstanding anything
contained in this Act, the following supplies shall be exempted from VAT, namely:—
Page 22 10/21/2013
(a) any supply or import specified in the first schedule; or
(b) any supply relating to a right or option to receive an exempted
supply.
MANNER OF VAT COLLECTION
Part-A: On Imports
